metadata.title: Free MP4 Compressor Online
metadata.description: Reduce MP4 file size in your browser. Choose the balance between smaller files and better visual quality, then download a compressed MP4.

shell.footerDescription: Reduce MP4 file size in your browser. No upload required.

hero.title: Make MP4 files smaller
hero.description: Compress videos for sharing, storage, and faster uploads while choosing your quality tradeoff.

workbench.readyMessage: Choose settings, then compress your MP4 in this browser.
workbench.processingMessage: Keep this tab open while your MP4 is compressed.
workbench.riskHint: Large files may be slower on low-memory devices.
workbench.privacyNote: Processed in your browser. Nothing was uploaded.
workbench.invalidTypeError: This version supports MP4 files only.
workbench.openError: This MP4 could not be opened in your browser.
workbench.compressError: The video could not be compressed. Try a smaller file or a lower resolution.

howTo.title: How to reduce MP4 file size online

steps.title: Upload MP4
steps.description: Choose your MP4 file from your device. Your video never leaves your browser.

steps.title: Choose quality
steps.description: Pick your preferred balance between smaller file size and better visual quality.

steps.title: Download smaller MP4
steps.description: Compress it on your device, then download the smaller MP4 instantly.

settings.title: Best settings for smaller MP4 files
settings.description: Choose a mode that matches your goal.

items.title: Best Quality
items.description: Highest visual quality with minimal compression.

items.title: Balanced
items.label: Recommended
items.description: Great balance between quality and smaller file size.

items.title: Smallest File
items.description: Smallest file size with more compression.

settings.note: Target size is approximate. The final size depends on your video content and the settings you choose.

items.question: Are my videos uploaded?
items.answer: No. The MVP compresses MP4 files locally in your browser. Your video is not uploaded to a backend server.

items.question: Can I compress videos without losing quality?
items.answer: Any real video compression can change visual quality. This tool lets you choose the tradeoff between smaller file size and better visual quality.

items.question: Why is my final size different from the target?
items.answer: Target size is approximate because the final size depends on motion, detail, duration, source bitrate, resolution, and audio settings.

items.question: Does it work on mobile?
items.answer: The page works on mobile, but large videos may be slow or fail on low-memory devices because compression runs in the browser.

footerTrust.title: Private & secure
footerTrust.description: 100% local processing in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

footerTrust.title: Fast & free
footerTrust.description: No sign-up. No limits. Compress as many as you want.

footerTrust.title: Works everywhere
footerTrust.description: Modern browsers on Windows, Mac, Linux, Android, and iOS.
